title: Lab 07: Cron Scheduling
description: Schedule a recurring task for a specific user

tasks: Create user ferro if it does not exist and set its password to cinder9.
Configure a cron job for ferro that runs every 2 minutes and logs the message "Lab 07 running" with logger.
checks: systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active crond | grep -qx active
